title: Proximity Ligation Assay (PLA)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"uhptz","text":"Proximity ligation assay (PLA), also referred to as Duolink® PLA technology, permits detection of protein–protein interactions in situ (\u003c40nm distance) at endogenous protein levels. It exploits specific antibodies identifying (either directly or indirectly) the two proteins of interest and takes advantage of specific DNA primers covalently linked to the antibodies. A hybridization step followed by a PCR amplification with fluorescent probes then permits visualization of spots of proximity by fluorescence microscopy.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sup","offset":59,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"wsymg","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
